kurosawa.name: Akira Kurosawa
kurosawa.prompt: Akira Kurosawa style watercolor and gouache storyboard, high emotional color palette, impressionistic brushstrokes, dramatic cinematic composition from Ran and Dreams.

ridley_scott.name: Ridley Scott
ridley_scott.prompt: Ridley Scott 'Ridleygram' style, ink and pencil contour drawing, high contrast comic book aesthetic, heavy atmospheric fog and chiaroscuro lighting, Alien and Blade Runner vibe.

bong.name: Bong Joon-ho
bong.prompt: Bong Joon-ho style clean pen line drawing, graphic novel aesthetic, precise camera angles with movement arrows, Parasite and Snowpiercer cinematic framing.

miyazaki.name: Hayao Miyazaki
miyazaki.prompt: Hayao Miyazaki style monochrome pencil ekonte, high information density, Studio Ghibli storyboard aesthetic, detailed character expressions and architectural notes.

wes_anderson.name: Wes Anderson
wes_anderson.prompt: Wes Anderson style symmetrical composition, simple line drawing, storybook aesthetic, centered framing, flat perspective, Grand Budapest Hotel color palette.

mad_max.name: George Miller (Mad Max)
mad_max.prompt: Mad Max Fury Road style action comic storyboard, high-speed dynamic tracking shots, vibrant desert colors, intricate mechanical details, aggressive cinematic framing.

iain_mccaig.name: Iain McCaig
iain_mccaig.prompt: Iain McCaig style character concept art, high-fashion silhouettes, intricate costuming details, expressive facial features, Star Wars prequel trilogy aesthetic.

hans_zimmer.name: Hans Zimmer
hans_zimmer.prompt: Hans Zimmer style wall of sound, deep base, hybrid orchestral and electronic textures, intense rhythmic drive, Inception and Interstellar atmosphere.

ludwig.name: Ludwig Göransson
ludwig.prompt: Ludwig Göransson style experimental score, unique focal instruments, blend of tribal and futuristic sounds, Oppenheimer and Mandalorian vibe.
